economic_notes: Salt River First Nation Development Corporation is a wholly-owned business enterprise accounted for by modified equity method. Development Corporation had total revenue of $6,555,934 and net loss of $10,396 for the year.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024 as labeled in the document. The Settlement Trust (Salt River First Nation Settlement Trust) is excluded from the consolidated reporting entity. Deferred revenue of $4,514,597 arose in 2021 (nil in 2020), primarily from ISC ($4,301,875) and Settlement Trust Distributions ($212,722). Total government transfers calculated as ISC + GNWT + FNIHB. OSR is negative because deferred revenue adjustment reduces total reported revenue below government transfers. Net debt position is ($7,708,770). Salt River First Nation Youth & Education Foundation is consolidated. Development Corporation (SRFNDC) is accounted for by modified equity method with total investment of $5,306,457.
